'''''[http://www.skyesports.in/ Skyesports]''''' in association with '''''[https://loco.gg/ LOCO]''''' present a BGMI tournament for the Indian region called the '''Skyesports Skirmish Series''' with a prize pool of ₹5,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}.

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{broadcasterCard
|position=Commentator
|b1=Captain Price
|b2=Gamezo Tech
|b3=Aimgod|b3flag=in|b3name=
|b4=NekRoz
}}
===Format===
* '''Quarter finals''': 
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16}} teams qualify for ''Semi finals.
{{VerticalMargin}}
* '''Semi finals'''
** 24 teams
*** 8 invited teams.
*** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Top 16}} teams from ''quarter finals.
** Teams are divided equally in 3 groups of 8.
** Round-robin format.
** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''finals.
{{VerticalMargin}}
* '''Finals''' : ''July 11th - 13th
** 16 teams , 3 matchdays.
** 18 matches (6 each day).
{{VerticalMargin}}
{{PUBGM 2023 Points System |killterm=finish}}
